summary: Frontend sprint 'Conversion Polish & Code Health' — ALL 11 required flows PASS on http://localhost:3000 (viewport 1920x900). Summary Chips render correctly with focus+clear behavior; hover-lift works on listing cards; FlashDeal badge is conditionally rendered (0 present as expected — no promo data); FK migration file exists with 3 constraints.
critical_code_review_comments: StickySearchBar.jsx:133-135 — handleClearWhere/Dates/Guests receive event from chip button but the X button is sibling, not nested inside the text button. e.stopPropagation is harmless but unnecessary; functionally fine.

resolveWhereLabel falls back to raw value ('phuket') if not matched in whereOptions. In test the label rendered as 'phuket' (lowercase) — acceptable per requirements but UX polish could title-case fallback or match ci-insensitively.
Console warning: /api/v2/search/locations returned 401 in test env (locations-seed fallback used). Not blocking — static seed serves WhereCombobox correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified: (1) Sticky bar appears on scrollY>280; (2) Summary chips row renders only when hasAnyFilter=true (hidden on /); (3) Three chips [sticky-chip-where|dates|guests] show resolved labels ('phuket', '12–19 May', '2 guests'); (4) Clicking inner button opens correct popover — WhereCombobox, SearchCalendar, Guests 4x2 grid; (5) X-button clears filter and removes chip (tested on guests→'1'); (6) Card hover transforms from 'none' to 'matrix(1,0,0,1,0,-4)' confirming -translate-y-1; (7) FlashDeal badges: 0 instances present (expected — no catalog_flash_urgency / catalog_promo_badge in seed data) — selector [data-testid^="listing-flash-deal-"] works when data appears; (8) Migration /app/supabase/migrations/20260205_db_integrity_fk.sql exists with fk_listings_country_code, fk_listings_region_code, fk_listings_city_code (static check only, not applied). 401 on /api/v2/search/locations is env-level (anon key / auth), not part of this sprint.
